target: 8. Open-Air Bath
Ugh~…

Ugh~, paradise~.
I guess a big bath is great, huh?
Hey~, Hizuru-chan?
…I agree that a big bath is nice, but…
Huh~~…?

Why are you here too?
This is my private open-air bath at the inn.

It's okay!
The inn staff said it's fine for us to enter!
You didn't answer my question…

(Well, I was also surprised by that.
I really admire how broad-minded Hoina is)

(Incidentally, I'm also realizing again how peaceful this island is.
Though it's definitely lacking in security)

You should have been done with your tour at the Koba Mart earlier.
You could just take a bath at home.

Because I wanted to take a bath
with Hizuru-chan, that's why~!

This big bath,
wouldn't it be more fun with everyone?

Maybe for you, but I prefer to think alone.
That's when my ideas come together.

Ideas? Like the stories
you write, Hizuru-chan?

Yeah, that's right.
So please be quiet for a bit.
Yes~~.
Ugh~…

(Though it's a bit different from my plan,
I've been touring around the island
and talking to various people)

(And all these experiences have been
input into my brain as 'information')

(Though this information helps my writing,
not all of it is useful)
(Each piece of information has its own unique flavor)

(Some have the silly flavor of that Hero of Justice,
others are as wild and rustic as an unfriendly hunter)

(Blending these various flavors together,
creating new tastes――)
(This is what we novelists do for a living, and our pleasure)

(But lately I've been focusing only on output,
neglecting the input of new information――
maybe I've been too careless with my curiosity)
(Ah, I see…)

(In other words, I'm in this situation
because of my own doing, I suppose)
(It's too late to realize this now)

(I don't want to admit it, but…
I probably wouldn't have reached this understanding alone)
…I should thank Hoina.
Did you say something?

Nothing much.
Just stay quiet and soak.
Yes~~.

Your phone's ringing?
Should I answer it?

It's fine.
It's probably just the editor checking in.
Editor…?
In short, they're the ones who turn my writings into books.
In that case, you should answer it!

Interrupting a writer's thoughts with an unnecessary call
is the height of incompetence as an editor.

I don't need to bother with it every time.
They'll give up on their own.
…There you go.
Huh, I don't get it, but――
The look on your face right now is kinda scary, Hizuru-chan.
Scary?

Hizuru-chan, you write all kinds of stories, right?
You shouldn't make such a serious face, you know?

I have so many things I want to do,
but when I think about actually doing them someday,
I get excited and smile uncontrollably!
Maybe… yeah, I used to feel that way too.
(You're right, Hoina…)
(If I can't enjoy my own work, what's the point?)
If you're going to do it, I think you should enjoy it!
So I should enjoy it, then.

(Thinking back, I haven't felt this way
in a long time…)
(Especially when it comes to work…)

Look, Hizuru-chan.
It's clear tonight, so the stars are visible.
Ah…

I really like looking at the stars.
Just staring at them is fun enough.

(The night sky of Hitogashima Island
is so beautiful…)

Hehe, the look on your face right now
is really nice, Hizuru-chan!

Is that so?
No…
If you say so, I guess it is.

(It's a good opportunity…
I'll stop thinking for a while)

(Just letting time pass without thinking…
feeling the flow of time…)
(It should be a waste of time, normally…)

(But this might be
a very luxurious kind of time after all)
